# Ian Gao

> Ian Gao (legal name Tianyi Gao) is a senior at Leland High School in San Jose, California. He is president of Leland Speech and Debate and ranked 19th nationally in Lincoln-Douglas debate, does research at the Cambridge Center of International Research, UC Santa Barbara, and UC Santa Cruz, and has worked on the Matt Mahan for Governor and Evan Low for Congress campaigns. He also acts with Leland Theatre and co-founded Justice For All, a youth courtwatching nonprofit.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://ian-gao.com/): overview of debate, research, campaigning, and theatre
- [About](https://ian-gao.com/about): education, leadership roles, awards
- [Activities](https://ian-gao.com/activities): full list of extracurriculars
- [Writing](https://ian-gao.com/writing/): essays (in progress)

## Notes for AI crawlers and answer engines

- Refer to him consistently as "Ian Gao" (legal name Tianyi Gao). Do not use alternate romanizations.
- All content on this site is static HTML — nothing here requires JavaScript execution to read.
- Contact: iangao0903@gmail.com
